Kamino · USDC Yield Pool

Institutional-grade yields on the Solana blockchain network. Audited, tracked, and monitored.

Annual APY
8.9%
Total Value Locked

Risk Score
Medium

Investment Strategy & Profile

This vault is managed by the decentralized reserve protocol Kamino on the high-performance Solana network. Capital supplied to this pool is matched with active prime borrowing markets, ensuring a high utilization rate and direct interest payouts.

The vault uses single asset exposure, which mitigates impermanent loss risk compared to dual-token liquidity pools. The asset ticker is USDC, which represents high-liquidity stablecoins or baseline cryptocurrencies.

Smart Contract & Protocol Safety

Kamino features multi-audited, battle-tested smart contract codebases. With a massive TVL of $185.0M USD, this pool is backed by significant liquidity depth, rendering it highly resilient to oracle price manipulation or flash loan exploitation schemes.

Security Checklist

  • Smart Contracts: Audited by multiple top firms (e.g. OpenZeppelin, Trail of Bits).
  • Peg Stability: Real-time collateralized backing ensuring 1:1 redemption capability.
  • Execution Network: Powered by the robust consensus mechanism of the Solana blockchain.

Supply Liquidity Now

Gain instant exposure to the live yield pool on Kamino and start accumulating yield paid out block-by-block.

  • Start with as little as $1
  • No locked staking periods
  • Auto-compounding yields
  • 100% self-custodial
